programmes.show_description: Summer Sausage, Pocket Poncho. While Sheldon is obsesses over Meemaw's budding relationship with his mentor, Dr. Sturgis, George and Mary attempt to bond with their other kids. S1, Ep21
Ice Cream, Gentlemen Callers. When Meemaw is pursued by two gentlemen callers, Sheldon interferes, forcing her to set some ground rules. S1, Ep22
Popping Popeye. Lisa fears the horn growing out of the back of her head could be cancer. Chuck has a Popeye-shaped bump on his arm, and two teen brothers have matching lumps. S1, Ep13
Sean's Story. 26-year-old Sean weighs over 700-lbs. His mother is forced to change both of their lifestyles before he can be approved for gastric bypass surgery. S4, Ep12
Moments of Truth. Explores 10 years of documentation of the super-obese to highlight key breakthrough moments within their turbulent but ultimately triumphant weight-loss journeys. S4, Ep13
Didn't Mean To Make Randy Cry. New consultant Cat tries to find the perfect dress for singer-songwriter Mary Lambert. Bald bride Rachel makes comments that bring Randy to tears. S21, Ep5
I'm Marrying Me. One-of-a-kind bride Nicoletta arrives with crystals, sage, and a plan to marry herself. Paraplegic bride, Natalie hopes to experience that magical bridal feeling. S21, Ep6
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
A High-Pitched Buzz. Sheldon dismantles the refrigerator to stop an annoying hum and then must get a paper route to pay for the repairs. S2, Ep1
A Rival Prodigy. When Dr. Sturgis bonds with Paige, another 10-year-old genius, Sheldon gets jealous. Meanwhile, Mary invites Paige's family over for a play date. S2, Ep2
A Crisis Of Faith. When Mary's faith is shaken by a tragedy in the community, Sheldon becomes an unlikely ally. S2, Ep3
A Financial Secret. When George Sr. asks Sheldon to keep a secret from Mary, the stress of not being honest drives Sheldon to hide out at Tam's for his first sleepover. S2, Ep4
A Research Study. Dr. Sturgis recommends Sheldon and Missy for a university research study on twins, and Mary is unhappy when the test results go to Sheldon's head. S2, Ep5
Seven Deadly Sins. Mary clashes with Sheldon's drama teacher Mr. Lundy over plans for a Halloween haunted house fundraiser for the church. S2, Ep6
The Hot Troll Deviation. Wolowitz is embarrassed when a secret of his is revealed, and Sheldon and Raj battle at work. S4, Ep4
The Desperation Emanation. Sheldon meets Amy's mum and comes to the realisation he no longer wants to see Amy, and Leonard realises everyone is in a relationship except for him. S4, Ep5
The Irish Pub Formulation. When Raj's sister has a one-day layover, he forbids the others from hooking up with her, unaware she and Leonard already did long ago. S4, Ep6
The Apology Insufficiency. The rest of the gang is interviewed by the FBI for Wolowitz's security clearance, with Sheldon accidentally letting slip some damaging information. S4, Ep7
The 21-Second Excitation. The guys camp out to see a print of Raiders of the Lost Ark with 21 extra seconds and are outraged to see Wil Wheaton and his friends skip the line. S4, Ep8
The Boyfriend Complexity. Penny asks Leonard to lie to her visiting father, while Howard, Raj and Bernadette spend all night looking through a telescope. S4, Ep9
The Alien Parasite Hypothesis. Amy crushes on one of Penny's dim ex-boyfriends, Zack. Raj and Wolowitz argue over who'd be the better superhero. S4, Ep10
Justice League Recombination. The guys get Zack and Penny to join their Justice League costume for a New Year's Eve bash at the comic book store. S4, Ep11
The Bus Pants Utilization. Their friendship becomes strained when Sheldon tries to take over Leonard's creation of a smartphone application that solves differential equations. S4, Ep12
The Love Car Displacement. Howard is jealous when Bernadette runs into her old boyfriend at a science event they're attending. S4, Ep13
The Thespian Catalyst. Sheldon wants acting lessons from Penny, hoping they will make him a better teacher. S4, Ep14
The Benefactor Factor. After meeting at a fundraising gala, an aged but wealthy Caltech donor makes Leonard ponder if he's willing to have sex with her to secure a donation. S4, Ep15
The Cohabitation Formulation. Howard contemplates a serious decision in his relationship with Bernadette, and Leonard and Raj's sister start seeing each other again. S4, Ep16
The Toast Derivation. Sheldon is in a crisis when he realises he's not the epicentre of the group, so he decides to find new friends. S4, Ep17
The Prestidigitation Approximation. Leonard has a tough choice to make when Priya asks him to stop spending time with Penny, and Howard keeps pestering Sheldon with a magic trick. S4, Ep18
The Zarnecki Incursion. The guys become sleuths to find out who hacked Sheldon's online-game account. S4, Ep19
The Herb Garden Germination. Sheldon and Amy decide to start rumours about themselves as a social test. Howard takes his relationship with Bernadette to an even higher level. S4, Ep20
The Agreement Dissection. Priya uses her legal expertise to rip apart Sheldon's roommate agreement, and the women take the flustered Sheldon out dancing. S4, Ep21
The Wildebeest Implementation. Raj makes an attempt to cure his phobia of talking to women, and Penny spies on Leonard and Priya with the help of Bernadette. S4, Ep22
The Engagement Reaction. Mrs. Wolowitz ends up in the hospital after Howard tells her he's marrying Bernadette. While there, Leonard stresses over Penny and Priya. S4, Ep23
Two Idiots On A Dirt Bike. Georgie's attempt to break up Missy and her new boyfriend backfires, with severe consequences. S1, Ep17
TV Money. Mandy tries to prove she's financially responsible after being called out on her poor spending habits, and Connor's girlfriend needs a place to stay. S1, Ep18
Dara Ó Briain is joined by guests Rhys James, Alasdair Beckett-King, Ed Byrne, Hugh Dennis and Ellie Taylor to comedically examine the week's events. S1, Ep7
Dara Ó Briain hosts more laughter filled game play with guests Rhys James, Angela Barnes, Sarah Keyworth, Glenn Moore, Milton Jones and Ahir Shah. S1, Ep6
Golden Finish. Guz wraps up his S2000 project, but not without a few wallet-draining surprises. He meets Mani's wild Capri and Bryn's racing Mini before the reveal. S1, Ep8
Carbon Dating, Stuffed Raccoon. Sheldon gets into trouble with fellow child genius Paige at the Science Museum, while George Sr. is forced to play therapist to Paige's parents. S2, Ep7
Scared Cyst-less. Dr. Sandra Lee treats Taylore, a young woman with unsightly elf-like bumps on her ears. Jose never goes out because of the baseball-sized lump on his head. S2, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta
programmes.show_description: Are You Looking for Trouble? Bridal dreams are tested when one bride invites her fiancé's ex-girlfriend to the salon. Plus, Tracy wants a short dress, her fiancé wants a long one. S2, Ep9
Brandi And Kandi's Story. 29-year-old twins Brandi and Kandi are close after a traumatic childhood, seeing food as a comfort. But after weight-loss surgery, more challenges await. S5, Ep1
Ashley R's Story. At 670 pounds, Ashley is desperate to save her life and her marriage to husband David. Can weight-loss surgery give her the chance for a family of her own? S5, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Mums And The Evil Aunt. Jordan is due to marry her childhood sweetheart and brings her mum, sister, and opinionated auntie along to find her perfect winter wonderland dress. S1, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Daddy Knows Best. Self-confessed Malibu Barbie, Yasmin, brings her dad wedding dress shopping, and daddy's girl Amy has a huge secret tattoo, but is ready to reveal it to her dad! S1, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Team Ballgown Or Team Fishtail? It's fishtail vs ball gown when bride Amy comes to the shop with her entourage. Plus, blushing bride Alice wants beads and bling - can she find it? S1, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Overshopped And Overwhelmed. Jennifer takes her mum and opinionated sister wedding dress shopping, and picky princess Jordan won't accept anything less than 100% perfect! S1, Ep4
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Mike's Apartment. When Mike invites Molly over to his apartment, his plans for romance are interrupted by an untimely call from his mum, Peggy. S1, Ep6
After The Lovin'. After spending the weekend with Molly, Mike comes on too strong. Then, taking Carl's advice to play it cool, he tries not to go overboard. S1, Ep7
Mike Snores. Annoyed when she spends all her time at Mike's apartment, Molly insists he spend a night at her place - and a taste of life with her mum and sister. S1, Ep8

Mike's New Boots. Molly becomes jealous when Mike introduces her as his friend to a woman who is clearly flirting with him. S1, Ep9
Molly Gets A Hat. When Mike's overbearing mother buys Molly a new hat as a gesture of goodwill, Molly feels obliged to invite her to spend Thanksgiving with her family. S1, Ep10
First Christmas. Mike tries to find the perfect gift for Molly, but he has absolutely no idea what to buy for their first Christmas together. S1, Ep12
An 8-Bit Princess. When Meemaw gives Sheldon his first video game, it takes over their lives. Meanwhile, George Sr. gets jealous when Georgie bonds with Herschel. S2, Ep8
Family Dynamics And Red Fiero. Sheldon studies his family for a psychology project when their Thanksgiving dinner turns into a fight after George Sr. is offered a job in Oklahoma. S2, Ep9
Stunted Childhood. When Sheldon learns that stunted childhoods can turn people into outcasts, he tries to act his age. Meemaw and Dr. Sturgis's relationship is tested. S2, Ep10
The Roommate Transmogrification. Mrs. Wolowitz ends up in the hospital after Howard tells her he's marrying Bernadette. While there, Leonard stresses over Penny and Priya. S4, Ep24
The Skank Reflex Analysis. Penny worries that she's screwed things up permanently with her friends after her night with Raj, while Sheldon takes command of the paintball team. S5, Ep1
The Pulled Groin Extrapolation. Leonard and Amy get to know each other better at a co-worker's wedding. Howard and Bernadette spend the weekend with Mrs. Wolowitz! S5, Ep3
The Wiggly Finger Catalyst. Raj is upset he's the only one of the four guys who's not in a relationship, so Penny sets out to find the perfect date. S5, Ep4
Russian Rocket Reaction, The. Sheldon and Leonard get invited to a housewarming party at Wil Wheaton's house. Howard gets an out-of-this-world opportunity! S5, Ep5
The Rhinitis Revelation. Craving a little motherly love, Sheldon competes with the gang for his mother's attention when she comes to visit. S5, Ep6
The Good Guy Fluctuation. A cute comic book artist tests Leonard's relationship with Priya, while Sheldon, getting into the Halloween spirit, tries to scare the guys. S5, Ep7
The Isolation Permutation. Amy is heartbroken when Bernadette and Penny go shopping for wedding dresses without her. S5, Ep8

programmes.show_name: New: Ruby & Jodi: A Cult Of Sin and Influence
programmes.show_description: Meet The Frankes. Vlogger Ruby Franke rises to fame for strict parenting, but her bond with therapist Jodi Hildebrandt ends in shocking abuse of her children. S1, Ep1

programmes.show_name: New: Ruby & Jodi: A Cult Of Sin and Influence
programmes.show_description: The Hildebrandt Method. Jodi Hildebrandt's disturbing counselling style comes to light as more families reveal how her teachings of control upended their lives. S1, Ep2
A Rising Star Shot Down. Tara Correa-McMullen was only 15 when she rose to fame in Hollywood. But a romance with the wrong person takes her out of the spotlight forever. S2, Ep7
